title: Lout's Loop
description:
A short loopable animation that I made for Frederator!...
(...with a little plot twist at the end just for you! )
They pot it with more sweet loops in one big/fat collab about snow flakes!

The result is pretty nice! Here's the whole thing:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yciQLXJ9Y8w
( My loop starts at 7:20 )

Frederator's channel:
https://www.youtube.com/user/ChannelFrederator

-----------------------------

Want to know a little more about the process I went through to make this thing? You can watch the "making of" here:
 https://youtu.be/5o5RxuCvXCQ

Here's the loopable version I sent to Frederator:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1y3zZhWUzE

Here's the music that plays during this animation:
https://soundcloud.com/pennazproductions/snowflakes-in-your-face
